title: Rollins to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: ATLANTA , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) ("Rollins" or the "Company"), a premier global consumer and commercial services company, today announced that Kenneth Krause, Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer will present at the following investor conferences: UBS Global Industrials and Transportation Conference 2023 at the Lotte New York Palace, June 6 th, 2023, from 8:00 a.m. – 8:40 a.m.
